source_jobs.title: Senior Account Executive — Technical Sales
source_jobs.description:
📍 SoHo, New York, NY · Full-time · From June 2026

Why this role matters

Formance is a $21M Series A company backed by PayPal Ventures and top-tier investors, building the financial backend that powers the next generation of fintechs, banks, and digital platforms. Already partnering with Coinbase, Fireblocks, and leading financial platforms across the US and Europe.

We opened our New York office almost a year ago to accelerate our expansion into the US market. We closed Q1 strong. We have the product, the customers, and the momentum. What we need now is someone who can walk into a room with a CTO or a Head of Engineering, understand their problem in 20 minutes, and make them feel like Formance is the only logical answer.

This isn't a role for someone who follows a script. It's for someone who genuinely enjoys the challenge of selling something technical to people who know their stuff.

What you'll actually do

 - Own the full sales cycle — from the first cold conversation to signed contract — on complex, multi-stakeholder deals. Your buyers are CTOs, VPs of Product, and Heads of Engineering at fintechs, SaaS platforms, and financial institutions.

 - Work closely with our founders and engineering team — not as a support function, but because the best deals at Formance happen when sales and product think together. You'll bring market signals back from the field that shape what we build next.

 - Identify high-potential targets in the US market, run discovery calls that go deep on architecture and business model, navigate procurement and compliance in technical environments, and close deals with conviction.

What we're looking for

Must-haves:

 - 4+ years in B2B tech sales, with a track record of closing complex deals with technical buyers — CTOs, VPs of Engineering, Heads of Product. You've sold infrastructure, APIs, developer tools, or technical SaaS.

 - US market experience: you understand how enterprise and mid-market deals move here — procurement cycles, legal constraints, stakeholder dynamics.

 - Comfort in an early-stage environment where the playbook is still being written, resources are focused, and your judgment matters more than your ability to follow a process.

What will set you apart:

 - You can explain a complex technical concept simply. You can build credibility with an engineer and a CFO in the same meeting. You get curious about a customer's architecture before you pitch.

 - Fintech or financial infrastructure experience is a plus — but not a requirement. What matters is your ability to get up to speed fast and sell with conviction in a technical environment.

Package

$150K base · $300K OTE with uncapped variable · Equity · 401(k) · Health insurance · Annual team offsite in Europe

About Formance

We're building the infrastructure layer for modern money movement — open-source at the core, with a growing suite of financial backend modules used by platforms operating at global scale.

Technical docs https://docs.formance.com · GitHub https://github.com/formancehq

source_jobs.title: Senior Account Executive — Fintech & Crypto
source_jobs.description:
📍 SoHo, New York, NY · Full-time · From June 2026

Why this role matters

Formance is a $21M Series A company backed by PayPal Ventures and top-tier investors, building the financial backend that powers the next generation of fintechs, banks, and digital platforms. Already partnering with Coinbase, Fireblocks, and leading financial platforms across the US and Europe.

We opened our New York office almost a year ago to accelerate our expansion into the US market. We closed Q1 strong. We have the product, the customers, and the momentum. What we need now is someone who can walk into a room with a CTO or a VP engineering, understand their problem in 20 minutes, and make them feel like Formance is the only logical answer.

This isn't a role for someone who follows a script. It's for someone who genuinely enjoys the challenge of selling something technical to people who know their stuff.

What you'll actually do

 - Own the full sales cycle — from the first cold conversation to signed contract — on deals typically ranging from $100K to $300K ACV. Your buyers are CTOs, VPs of Product, and Heads of Payments at fintechs, crypto platforms, and financial institutions.

 - Work closely with our founders and engineering team — not as a support function, but because the best deals at Formance happen when sales and product think together. You'll bring market signals back from the field that shape what we build next.

 - Identify high-potential targets in the US fintech and crypto ecosystem, run discovery calls that go deep on architecture and business model, navigate procurement and compliance in regulated environments, and close deals with conviction.

What we're looking for

 - Must-haves:
   
   - 4+ years in B2B tech sales, with experience selling into fintech, payments, banking, or crypto. You've closed complex deals with technical buyers — not just managed accounts.
   
   - US market experience: you understand how enterprise and mid-market deals move here — procurement cycles, legal constraints, stakeholder dynamics.
   
   - Comfort in an early-stage environment where the playbook is still being written, resources are focused, and your judgment matters more than your ability to follow a process.
   
   What will set you apart:
   
   - You can explain a complex infrastructure concept simply. You can build credibility with an engineer and a CFO in the same meeting. You get curious about a customer's architecture before you pitch.

Package

$150K base · $300K OTE with uncapped variable · Equity · 401(k) · Health insurance · Annual team offsite in Europe

About Formance

We're building the infrastructure layer for modern money movement — open-source at the core, with a growing suite of financial backend modules used by platforms operating at global scale.

Technical docs https://docs.formance.com · GitHub https://github.com/formancehq

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative — Fintech & Crypto
source_jobs.description:
📍 SoHo, New York, NY · Full-time · From June 2026

Why this role matters

Formance is a $21M Series A company backed by PayPal Ventures and top-tier investors, building the financial backend that powers the next generation of fintechs, banks, and digital platforms.Already partnering with Coinbase, Fireblocks, and leading financial platforms across the US and Europe.

We opened our New York office almost a year ago. We have the product, the momentum, and a growing revenue team. What we need now is someone who can generate high-quality pipeline from scratch — reaching out to the right people, starting real conversations, and knowing how to talk to engineers and technical decision-makers without losing them in the first two minutes.

This isn't a role where you follow automated sequences and wait for replies. It's for someone who actually enjoys the hunt — researching a prospect, crafting an outreach that cuts through the noise, and turning a cold intro into a qualified conversation.

What you'll actually do

 - Own outbound from end to end — identifying high-potential targets across fintech, crypto, and financial infrastructure, crafting personalized outreach across email and LinkedIn, and running initial discovery calls before handing off to the AE team.

 - Your buyers are VP Engineering and CTOs. You'll need to understand what they're building well enough to make them feel like Formance gets their problem — before they've ever heard of us.

 - Work closely with the founders and AEs to sharpen messaging, test new approaches, and help build the outbound playbook as we scale the US market.

What we're looking for

 - 1+ year in a B2B tech sales environment. You've done real outbound, not just inbound qualification.

 - More than experience, we care about how you operate. Do you do your homework before reaching out? Can you hold a technical conversation without a script? Do you iterate on what's not working instead of sending the same sequence on repeat?

 - You're comfortable in an early-stage environment where you help build the process, not just execute it. You're a doer — high volume, high quality, and you don't wait to be told what to do next.

Package

70k base · $115K OTE with uncapped variable · Equity · 401(k) · Health insurance · Annual team offsite in Europe

About Formance

We're building the infrastructure layer for modern money movement — open-source at the core, with a growing suite of financial backend modules used by platforms operating at global scale.

Technical docs https://docs.formance.com · GitHub https://github.com/formancehq

notes: Fintech company with strong sales focus, no tech roles posted
